artifacts.summary:
{"ProviderType":"GitHub","CommitMessage":"fix(pipeline): ship deploy/change-record buildspecs in the Build artifact

Deploy-dev/test/stage and ChangeRecord run CodeBuild against BuildArtifact and
load their buildspec from it, but the Build stage only emitted imageDetail/
taskdef/appspec — so those stages failed with 'no such file'. Include the two
buildspec files in the artifact."}
